parents.subject: LU-7925 llite: avoid clearing i_nlink for inodes in use

commit.subject: LU-4009 osd: internal range locking for write/punch
commit.message:
LU-4009 osd: internal range locking for write/punch

we need this for upcoming ZIL support - a separate thread
writing ZIL records may need to block modifications to
specific ranges to preserve csum's during ZIL flush.

Change-Id: Ia9e0d1b3992a6e69417c85470e01a5e1b964a880
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
